name: @datafoundry/tui
description: Terminal UI for DataFoundry - CopilotKit protocol client

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/auth/cookie-jar.test.js dist/auth/session-store.test.js dist/auth/authenticated-transport.test.js dist/auth/auth-client.test.js dist/auth/bootstrap.test.js dist/auth/browser-opener.test.js dist/auth/interactive-login.test.js dist/config/config-client.test.js dist/protocol/copilotkit-client-auth.test.js dist/startup-preflight.test.js dist/index-auth-wiring.test.js dist/commands/logout-command.test.js dist/no-bare-fetch.guard.test.js dist/ui/components/EnhancedInputBox.test.js
